artifact: RCA report: partial from prompt facts only. January 1998 card-withdrawal count is stated as 1,702 versus a 1997 monthly average of 180.5, about 9.4x higher. SQL execution was unavailable, so I cannot determine whether late-1997 issuance, card type, or district concentration is the actual driver. The planned drill separates card type, district, and Q4-1997 issuance cohort shares within January 1998 card withdrawals.

sql.monthly_counts: SELECT date_trunc('month', CAST(t.date AS DATE)) AS month, COUNT(*) AS card_withdrawals FROM trans t WHERE t.operation='VYBER KARTOU' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1998-02-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.jan1998_card_type: SELECT c.type AS card_type, COUNT(*) AS jan1998_count, COUNT(*)::double precision / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER () AS share FROM trans t JOIN disp dp ON dp.account_id=t.account_id JOIN card c ON c.disp_id=dp.disp_id WHERE t.operation='VYBER KARTOU' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1998-01-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1998-02-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY jan1998_count DESC;
sql.jan1998_district_cohort: SELECT d."A2" AS district, d."A3" AS region, CASE WHEN CAST(c.issued AS DATE) >= DATE '1997-10-01' AND CAST(c.issued AS DATE) < DATE '1998-01-01' THEN 'issued_1997Q4' ELSE 'older_card' END AS issuance_cohort, COUNT(*) AS jan1998_count FROM trans t JOIN account a ON a.account_id=t.account_id JOIN district d ON d.district_id=a.district_id JOIN disp dp ON dp.account_id=a.account_id JOIN card c ON c.disp_id=dp.disp_id WHERE t.operation='VYBER KARTOU' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) >= DATE '1998-01-01' AND CAST(t.date AS DATE) < DATE '1998-02-01' GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY jan1998_count DESC LIMIT 30;
